user.description: Select the infrared emitter that will be used to send commands to the fan.

reconfigure.description: Select the infrared emitter that will be used to send commands to the fan.

abort.no_infrared_entities: No infrared emitter entities were found. Set up an Infrared-compatible device (e.g. an ESPHome IR blaster) first.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The infrared emitter was updated successfully.
